docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED NOV-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT URZUA, JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHABOUB, DJOHRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URZUA, JOSE $420.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $420.00 FILED BY CHABOUB, DJOHRA AS TO DEFENDANT URZUA, JOSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-21-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
